subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him whom the wine of utterance hath seized, until he turned unto his Lord, the All-Merciful, Who hath come with a proof that rendereth all powerless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اخذه سکر البیان الی ان توجه الی ربه الرحمن الذی اتی ببرهان عجز
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @degrees of faith; certitude, @the power of words; of speech
